annotator_a: Primary author (manual review after Groq pre-label)
annotator_b: Secondary reviewer (independent blind pass, stricter analysis threshold)

disagreements.text: [Stein]The Bucks, league sources say, remain hopeful Giannis Antetokounmpo will decide against asking to be dealt after a third successive first-round playoff exit and choose instead to extend a career that has spanned 12 seasons as a Buck to date.
Nikola Jokic on how this offseason will be compared to last: "The next couple of days is gonna be a lot of beer probably"
Tim Connelly built the championship roster. Calvin Booth systematically dismembered it and replaced it with a roster that looks like a rebuilding team outside of the starting 5

disagreement_analysis: 6/35 disagreements (82.9% agreement, κ=0.73). Conflicts cluster on hot_take vs analysis (embedded facts) and hot_take vs reaction (highlight/link posts). Clear-cut analysis and reaction posts agreed 100%.
